calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward A. Koplowitz for and with Suzanne Lavoie (Beneficiary). Jenny Smith for Jean Paul Lavoie and Elizabeth Capron (Beneficiaries). Lawrence Siracusa for and with Debra Dolch (Trustee). Richard Schindler for the Lavoie Siblings (Co-Trustees).

After having discussion among all parties outside of court, Mr. Siracusa reported that the parties have resolved the issues, that Suzanne will received distribution in the amount of $71, 213.63 plus the condo, that the homeowner's expenses have been paid up to January 31, 2014. Ms. Smith confirmed that her clients have agreed. Mr. Koplowitz agreed that the order presented is proper and that he requested the Court to voir dire Suzanne. The Court expressed concern that the order is different from the petition. All Counsel agreed to approve the order as to form. The Court vior dire the parties of the agreement of the modification of the distribution that is different from the petition and that Suzanne will receive distribution in the amount of $71,213.63 and the condo. Suzanne confirmed that she understood and agreed to the distribution. Mr. Koplowitz, Ms. Smith, Mr. Siracusa and Mr. Schindler confirmed that they agreed. Suzanne made a statement and requested to see her niece. The Court accepted her statement. Mr. Schindler agreed that he can relate the message to the niece. The Court granted the petition with the agreement of the modification of the distribution (subject to review of the order). All Counsel approved the order as to form.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Continued To Jan-13-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (75 Gable Court, San Rafael, Ca 94903)
Off Calendar Dec-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $520,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 28, 2012. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For: 1. Accounting By Trustees 2. Removal Of Improperly Appointed Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Debra Dolch (Co-Trustee). Richard Schindler for Jean Paul Lavoie, Elizabeth Lavoie and Margaret Lavoie.

The only matter before the Court is the accounting. The Parties stipulated to the Court granting today's petition, participating in mediation after the accounting is rendered and reserving the issue of Attorney's fees. The Court will sign today's order once it receives the stipulation and order with regard to the above. The request for Attorney's fees was denied without prejudice. Mr. Siracusa is to prepare an accounting to include all of the trusts/sub trusts. The Court granted the petition (subject to the written order). Mr. Blum is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
